indicatorDescs.PRE: Control of your debts and commitments

indicatorChallenges.PRE: Stick to your budget every week

reg.commentNoData: No data yet. Start logging your expenses to activate this lever.
reg.commentExcellent: Excellent: frequency {{ewma}}/100, streak of {{streak}} weeks, average score {{avgN}}/10. Exemplary regularity — keep it up!
reg.commentGoodShortStreak: Good frequency ({{ewma}}/100) but your streak is too short ({{streak}} wk). Aim for consistency.
reg.commentGoodLowIntensity: Good frequency ({{ewma}}/100) but intensity can improve (avg. score {{avgN}}/10). Aim for consistency.
reg.commentModerate: Moderate frequency ({{ewma}}/100). You save irregularly. Even a small amount each week makes a difference.
reg.commentWeak: Low frequency ({{ewma}}/100). Regularity is the most important lever — aim for at least 4 consecutive weeks.

pre.commentNoBudget: No budget configured. Without a budget plan, this lever stays at 0. Configure your budgets in the wizard to activate budget precision.
pre.commentAllGood: Excellent budget control across all 3 tiers. Non-discretionary {{rI}}% ({{sI}}/100), Semi-essential {{rS}}% ({{sS}}/100), Discretionary {{rD}}% ({{sD}}/100).{{volSuffix}}
pre.commentWeakIncomp: Watch your essential expenses ({{rI}}% → {{sI}}/100) — food, housing and health exceed the budget. These items are penalized heavily as they are non-discretionary.{{volSuffix}}
pre.commentWeakSemi: Semi-essential expenses are the weak link ({{rS}}% → {{sS}}/100) — transport, telecom or education need review. Non-discretionary OK at {{sI}}/100.{{volSuffix}}
pre.commentWeakDisc: Discretionary expenses are dragging your score down ({{rD}}% → {{sD}}/100). Clothing and leisure: every dollar saved raises the score. Non-discretionary {{sI}}/100, Semi-essential {{sS}}/100.{{volSuffix}}
pre.volSuffix: Volatility penalty active (×{{penalty}}) — your spending varies too much from week to week.

sec.commentNoObjective: EPR target not defined. The absence of a savings plan is a risk factor — configure your targets in the wizard (score: 40/100).
sec.commentExcellent: {{cumul}} accumulated vs {{prorated}} expected at W{{weeks}} ({{coveragePct}}%). Well ahead — solid financial security.
sec.commentAhead: {{cumul}} accumulated vs {{prorated}} expected at W{{weeks}} ({{coveragePct}}%). Ahead of your Y{{planYear}} savings plan.
sec.commentModerate: {{cumul}} out of {{prorated}} expected at W{{weeks}} ({{coveragePct}}%). Moderate lag — {{ecart}} missing to be on track.
sec.commentBehind: {{cumul}} out of {{prorated}} expected at W{{weeks}} ({{coveragePct}}%). Significantly behind — accelerate savings to catch up {{ecart}}.
sec.commentCritical: Only {{cumul}} out of {{prorated}} expected at W{{weeks}} ({{coveragePct}}%). Critical situation — your safety cushion is severely insufficient.

eff.commentNoTargetsWithIncome: No income targets configured, but you are recording income. Configure your sources in the wizard to activate full scoring (current score: 60/100).
eff.commentNoTargetsNoIncome: No income targets configured and no income recorded. Add your sources in the wizard to activate this lever (neutral score: 50/100).
eff.commentAbove100: Over {{nbW}} weeks, {{actual}} received vs {{expected}} expected ({{pct}}%). Your income exceeds projections!{{typeContext}}
eff.commentAbove80: Over {{nbW}} weeks, {{actual}} received out of {{expected}} expected ({{pct}}%). Almost on target — {{ecart}} short.{{typeContext}}
eff.commentAbove50: Over {{nbW}} weeks, {{actual}} out of {{expected}} expected ({{pct}}%). Gap of {{ecart}} to close.{{typeContext}}
eff.commentBelow50: Over {{nbW}} weeks, only {{actual}} out of {{expected}} expected ({{pct}}%). Large gap of {{ecart}}.{{typeContext}}
eff.typeContextFixeLag: Your fixed income is behind — check salary and pensions.
eff.typeContextVarLag: Your variable income is low — bonuses or freelance pending?
eff.typeContextBothLag: Both income types are below expectations.

lit.commentFloor: Your expertise (EKH {{ekhNorm}}/100) guarantees a floor score. Complete your weekly challenges ({{completed}}/{{total}}) to surpass this minimum.
lit.commentGood: Good knowledge ({{know}}/100) and active engagement ({{engage}}/100). {{completed}}/{{total}} challenges completed — keep progressing through the curriculum.
lit.commentAverage: Decent knowledge ({{know}}/100) but engagement is low ({{engage}}/100). Do your challenges each week to boost this lever.
lit.commentWeak: Limited knowledge ({{know}}/100). Literacy impacts ALL other levers. Redo the wizard and complete your challenges ({{completed}}/{{total}}).

actions.noAction: No action required at the moment

varDistribution.maxCostHint: This is the maximum amount your management can cost you.

economicBreakdown.balanceGood: Great, your finances are well balanced!
economicBreakdown.balanceWarning: Warning, you are spending a lot relative to your income
economicBreakdown.balanceAlert: Alert: you are spending more than you earn

savingsPlan.onTrack: You are on the right track!

investmentPortfolio.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see this section.
investmentPortfolio.introText: By analyzing your income and expenses, the app estimates you could invest {{monthly}}/month. The figures below simulate what would happen if you did so for 3 years.
investmentPortfolio.introDetail: {{ratio}}% of your savings dedicated to investment
investmentPortfolio.productsHint: The products you invest in and their annual return.
investmentPortfolio.projectionHint: Simulation: if you invest {{monthly}}/month for 36 months at {{annualReturn}}%/year.
investmentPortfolio.gainsHint: What your investment earns you on top
investmentPortfolio.investVsSleep: Investing vs. letting your money sleep
investmentPortfolio.comparisonHint: Comparison: what happens if you put the same amount in a classic savings account?
investmentPortfolio.investBetter: By investing, you earn more than leaving your money in a simple savings account.
investmentPortfolio.livretBetter: With this portfolio, a classic savings account would be more advantageous.
investmentPortfolio.disclaimer: Indicative simulation based on your data. Past returns do not guarantee future returns. Consult an advisor before investing.

allWeather.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile to see the All-Weather analysis.

kelly.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile and allocations to see Kelly sizing.
kelly.kellyExplanation: The Kelly criterion calculates the optimal size of each position to maximize long-term growth without risk of ruin. Half-Kelly is recommended for greater safety.

factorAnalysis.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile to see factor analysis.

monteCarlo.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see this section.
monteCarlo.disclaimer: Based on 1,000 stochastic simulations using the historical volatility of your assets. Past results do not guarantee future performance.

stressTest.configurePortfolio: Configure your investment portfolio to simulate historical stress tests.

macro.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see this section.
macro.disclaimer: Simulation based on average historical sensitivities. Actual impacts may vary depending on specific market conditions.

behavioral.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see behavioral analysis.
behavioral.disclaimer: Analysis based on your current allocation. Behavioral biases are normal cognitive tendencies — recognizing them is the first step to correcting them.

preMortem.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see the pre-mortem analysis.
preMortem.noScenario: No failure scenario identified for your current portfolio.
preMortem.title: Pre-Mortem Analysis
preMortem.subtitle: What if your plan failed?
preMortem.disclaimerNote: This analysis is indicative and based on historical probabilities. It does not constitute investment advice.

psychScore.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile and allocations to see your ACE psychological score.
psychScore.disclaimer: The ACE score measures your psychological maturity as an investor through awareness, control, and execution. It evolves with your allocations.

taxOptimization.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see tax analysis.
taxOptimization.disclaimer: Indicative estimates, consult a tax advisor for your personal situation.

emergingMarkets.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see the emerging markets radar.
emergingMarkets.disclaimer: Analysis based on macroeconomic trends 2024-2026. Does not constitute investment advice.

regulatory.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see regulatory analysis.
regulatory.disclaimer: Indicative analysis, consult a professional for the regulatory compliance of your investments.

coach.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile to activate the coach.
coach.noQuestions: No questions for you at the moment. Your portfolio seems balanced.
coach.title: Socratic Coach
coach.subtitle: Question your investment choices
coach.subtitleHint: Questions to refine your financial thinking.
coach.footerText: The Socratic coach helps you reflect, not decide. Each question is an invitation to deepen your understanding of your financial choices.
coach.footerDisclaimer: This analysis is indicative and does not constitute investment advice.

wisdom.configureProfile: Configure your investor profile and allocations to see the global synthesis.
wisdom.disclaimer: This synthesis aggregates results from 12 independent analysis engines. It evolves with your allocations and does not constitute investment advice.

kpi.invisibleCostsTooltip: What your management costs you without you seeing it.
kpi.visibleCostsTooltip: What your management costs you in an obvious way.
kpi.maxCostTooltip: The maximum your management can cost you.
kpi.toleratedCostsTooltip: What you have accepted to pay so far.
kpi.invisibleCashbackTooltip: Hidden money in your expenses, recoverable.
kpi.projectedCosts3yTooltip: What it will cost you if nothing changes.

premortem.noProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see the pre-mortem analysis.
premortem.noFailures: No failure scenarios identified for your current portfolio.
premortem.title: Pre-Mortem Analysis
premortem.subtitle: What if your plan failed?
premortem.disclaimer: This analysis is indicative and based on historical probabilities. It does not constitute investment advice.

compliance.noProfile: Configure your investor profile in settings to see the regulatory analysis.
compliance.disclaimer: Indicative analysis, consult a professional for the regulatory compliance of your investments.
